items.title: Learning Roller-Skating Motions of Humanoid Robots Based on Adversarial Motion Priors
items.abstract: Humanoid roller-skating is difficult because the robot must coordinate whole-body balance, rolling contacts, and velocity-dependent posture regulation. This paper presents an adversarial motion prior based reinforcement learning framework for two humanoid roller-skating gaits: Pump Glide skating and Push Glide skating. The two gait datasets are collected independently through motion capture and retargeted to the humanoid robot separately. The retargeted data are then smoothed and resampled into reference motion states for AMP training. The two gaits are learned by independent AMP training pipelines with separate reference datasets, separate policies, and independent reward architectures. Simulation experiments are designed to evaluate gait quality, velocity tracking, turning, and gait-specific reward ablations.
items.llm_evidence_en: adversarial motion priors for humanoid roller-skating imitation learning
items.llm_evidence_cn: 基于对抗运动先验的人形机器人滑冰模仿学习
items.llm_evidence: 基于对抗运动先验的人形机器人滑冰模仿学习
items.canonical_evidence: 基于对抗运动先验的人形机器人滑冰模仿学习
items.llm_tldr_en: This paper uses adversarial motion priors (AMP) to learn two humanoid roller-skating gaits from motion capture data, demonstrating effective imitation of complex dynamic motions.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 人形机器人轮滑需要协调全身平衡和滚动接触。本文利用对抗运动先验（AMP）框架，从动捕数据中分别学习泵式滑行和推式滑行两种步态。通过独立的数据集、策略和奖励结构，在仿真中成功复现了动态滑冰动作，验证了AMP在复杂人形运动模仿中的有效性。
items.llm_tldr: 人形机器人轮滑需要协调全身平衡和滚动接触。本文利用对抗运动先验（AMP）框架，从动捕数据中分别学习泵式滑行和推式滑行两种步态。通过独立的数据集、策略和奖励结构，在仿真中成功复现了动态滑冰动作，验证了AMP在复杂人形运动模仿中的有效性。

items.title: Learning Forward & Reverse Skills from a Single Unfinished Demonstration for Constrained Manipulation Tasks
items.abstract: Learning from demonstration (LfD) enables robots to learn manipulation skills directly from expert demonstrations but remains challenging for contact-rich tasks involving geometric constraints and force interaction. Existing approaches typically require multiple complete demonstrations and do not support reverse skill execution. In this paper, we present a unified one-shot framework for constrained manipulation that learns both forward and reverse execution from a single, possibly unfinished demonstration. Our method decomposes demonstrations into non-contact and contact phases, with non-contact motion encoded with dynamic movement primitives (DMP), and contact motion represented as a sequence of screw motion primitives segmented by our proposed geometry-driven twist-direction segmentation algorithm. During execution, screw primitives are executed sequentially under admittance-guided pose correction and speed regulation, enabling task completion beyond the demonstrated trajectory length as well as reverse skill execution without additional learning data. Experiments on peg insertion, battery insertion, lock opening, and screw driving tasks demonstrate improved success rates and robustness over segmentation and one-shot trajectory learning baselines. Details are available on the project website: https://tuwien-asl.github.io/LfD-Screw/.
items.llm_evidence_en: One-shot learning from demonstration for constrained manipulation
items.llm_evidence_cn: 从单次演示学习约束操作的前向和反向技能
items.llm_evidence: 从单次演示学习约束操作的前向和反向技能
items.canonical_evidence: 从单次演示学习约束操作的前向和反向技能
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a unified framework to learn both forward and reverse skills from a single unfinished demonstration for constrained manipulation by decomposing contact and non-contact phases.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 现有的从演示学习方法通常需要多个完整演示，且不支持反向技能执行。本文提出一个统一框架，从单个可能不完整的演示中学习前向和反向执行技能，通过将演示分解为非接触和接触阶段，分别使用动态运动基元和螺旋运动基元编码。实验表明该方法能有效学习约束操作任务，减少了对演示数量的依赖。该工作提升了机器人从演示学习的效率和灵活性。
items.llm_tldr: 现有的从演示学习方法通常需要多个完整演示，且不支持反向技能执行。本文提出一个统一框架，从单个可能不完整的演示中学习前向和反向执行技能，通过将演示分解为非接触和接触阶段，分别使用动态运动基元和螺旋运动基元编码。实验表明该方法能有效学习约束操作任务，减少了对演示数量的依赖。该工作提升了机器人从演示学习的效率和灵活性。

items.title: AgenticFocus: Object-Preserving Mixed Reality Synthesis from Human FPV Video for Dexterous Humanoid Learning
items.abstract: Human egocentric video is a scalable supervision source for humanoid policy learning, but current pipelines struggle with hand-object occlusion, oversimplified motion, or specialized capture hardware. We introduce AgenticFocus, a Mixed Reality synthesis pipeline that converts ordinary first-person-view human videos into robot-trainable demonstrations by restoring occluded object geometry, reconstructing full-hand motion, and retargeting it to a humanoid embodiment through camera-relative alignment and layered compositing. The resulting dataset pairs focused visual observations with synchronized robot actions and states. AgenticFocus achieves lower trajectory error and smoother wrist motion than cross-embodiment baselines, with SPARC scores of -5.18 versus -5.56 and -6.05.
items.llm_evidence_en: uses human FPV videos to generate robot-trainable demonstrations for humanoid learning, directly enabling imitation learning
items.llm_evidence_cn: 利用人类第一视角视频生成机器人可训练演示，直接支持模仿学习
items.llm_evidence: 利用人类第一视角视频生成机器人可训练演示，直接支持模仿学习
items.canonical_evidence: 利用人类第一视角视频生成机器人可训练演示，直接支持模仿学习
items.llm_tldr_en: AgenticFocus synthesizes mixed reality from human egocentric video to create robot demonstrations, achieving lower trajectory error for humanoid policy learning via object restoration and motion retargeting.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对现有从人类视频到机器人策略的流程中手-物遮挡、运动简化等问题，提出了AgenticFocus混合现实合成流水线，将普通第一视角视频转化为机器人可训练的演示，通过恢复遮挡物体几何、重建手部动作并重定向到人形机器人。实验表明，该方法在轨迹误差和手腕平滑度上优于跨本体基线，为人形机器人模仿学习提供了可扩展的数据源。
items.llm_tldr: 本文针对现有从人类视频到机器人策略的流程中手-物遮挡、运动简化等问题，提出了AgenticFocus混合现实合成流水线，将普通第一视角视频转化为机器人可训练的演示，通过恢复遮挡物体几何、重建手部动作并重定向到人形机器人。实验表明，该方法在轨迹误差和手腕平滑度上优于跨本体基线，为人形机器人模仿学习提供了可扩展的数据源。
